arts.ttl: Preston's Osmajic handed eight-match ban and fine for Blackburn bite
arts.sum: Preston North End striker Mulatin Osmajic has been handed an eight-match ban and £15,000 fine for biting Blackburn defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic learns punishment for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck
arts.sum: The Football Association announces how many games Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic will miss for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Preston's Osmajic given eight-game ban for bite
arts.sum: Preston forward Milutin Osmajic has been given an eight-game suspension for biting Blackburn's on-loan Liverpool defender Owen Beck during an EFL Championship match last month.

arts.ttl: Preston’s Milutin Osmajic given eight-match ban for biting Blackburn’s Owen Beck
arts.sum: The incident took place at Deepdale on September 22.

arts.ttl: Preston North End's Milutin Osmajic discovers punishment for bizarre bite ahead of Burnley clash
arts.sum: Preston North End’s Milutin Osmajic will miss tomorrow’s Lancashire derby against Burnley after being handed an eight-match ban.

arts.ttl: Preston’s Milutin Osmajic banned for eight games after biting opponent
arts.sum: Osmajic has also been fined £15,000 after an independent Regulatory Commission reviewed the incident with Blackburn’s Owen Beck in the Lancashire derby

arts.ttl: Preston footballer is handed a HUGE ban as he admits to BITING opponent on the neck, which was missed by the referee
arts.sum: Osmajic's ban will begin immediately. However, he has already featured in two games since he bit Beck - including Wednesday's 3-0 win over Watford in which he scored two goals.

arts.ttl: Preston star Milutin Osmajic handed EIGHT-match ban for biting Blackburn rival
arts.sum: Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic has been suspended for eight matches after admitting to biting an opponent when the Championship side played Blackburn Rovers

arts.ttl: Scott Parker welcomes Jack Cork's return to Burnley in academy player/coach role
arts.sum: Scott Parker has welcomed Jack Cork’s return to Burnley and has emphasised the importance of keeping club legends involved behind the scenes.

arts.ttl: Scott Parker addresses Burnley's impressive defensive record ahead of Preston North End derby
arts.sum: Scott Parker has stressed the importance of developing a solid foundation for his Burnley side to work from.
